nodes.title: San Antonio Sports Showcases All-American Bowl and All-Star Game
3 Super Bowl LII Commercial Trend Predictions
New TV Network Adding More UTSA Football and Texas Affiliates

pageContext.content:
For the 3rd consecutive year now, Quarter Moon Productions will produce a UTSA football game according to CEO Bob Wills;
 
“The studio is very proud to support UTSA Athletics and their very successful football program. Four years ago, we were the first organization to get UTSA Football on television….and now, every UTSA football game is televised. UTSA football is a hot commodity in the sports broadcasting world!”
 
This year’s Conference USA game against University of Texas-El Paso will air on KMYS-TV on Saturday October 3rd. The game, which is slated for a 7 p.m. (CT) kickoff, will mark the third all-time meeting between the programs. UTSA won its inaugural C-USA tilt back in 2013 at the Sun Bowl by a score of 32-13 and the Miners came back to blank the Roadrunners, 34-0, last season at the Alamodome.
 
Jay Howard (play-by-play), Don Harris (analyst) and Jim Goodman (sidelines) will call all the game action. Hector Ledesma will anchor the Halftime and Post-Game Shows.
KMYS-CW 35 is available in the San Antonio market on AT&T U-Verse (35/1035 HD), DirecTV (35), DISH Network (35), Grande Communications (7/807 HD), Time Warner Cable (7/1212 HD) and over the air (35.1).
pageContext.title: Quarter Moon Productions to Produce UTSA’s Conference USA Opener at UTEP on KMYS-TV/CW-35
